name: Hydro Beam CMY
comment: Offering power, precision and reliability, the Hydro Beam CMY is a versatile IP65-rated automated beam luminaire. Harnessing the power of an OSRAM Sirius HRI 310W PRO discharge lamp, focused through precision-engineered optics and projected from a high-quality glass lens, it generates a razor-sharp 2-degree beam. An extensive feature set is headlined by CMY color mixing and also includes 17 static GOBOS, two rotating prisms, a frost filter, and integrated Aria X2 wireless DMX control and remote fixture management. Featuring lightning-fast movement, this robust fixture is designed to create impressive aerial effects for large indoor as well as outdoor events.
